title: Buttery Dutch Onion Bake
description: A savory, comforting dish featuring caramelized onions in a buttery Dutch oven bake.
instructions: In a large Dutch oven, sauté chopped onion in melted butter until caramelized.
Add thawed bake mixture to the pot and stir to combine.
Cover the pot and transfer to the preheated oven.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the bake is golden brown and the onions are tender.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
